campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: Campbell's City Council met to discuss updating the tax rates that local businesses pay for their licenses in the city. Shannon Dragman from the finance department presented the proposed changes to these tax rates, and the council discussed the matter in public before making a decision.
keyTopics: Business license tax rates are being increased or adjusted
Changes will take effect in the next fiscal year
Finance department presented the updated rate proposal
Council deliberated and voted on the ordinance changes

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026, where residents could voice concerns about a proposed new rule or policy. After hearing public input, the council moved forward by introducing the ordinance and skipping the usual first reading process, planning to vote on final adoption at their next meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held for community input on proposed ordinance
First reading of ordinance waived to speed up approval process
Ordinance scheduled for final vote at next regular council meeting
Specific ordinance topic not detailed in agenda summary

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026 to approve meeting minutes and reviewed the city's finances for February 2026. The council authorized several construction and professional service contracts to move forward with town improvements and hired contractors to complete various projects.
keyTopics: Approved February 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contracts with multiple vendors including QLM, Inc.
Approved three-year professional services agreement
Reviewed and approved minutes from previous April 7 meetings

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 29, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council met to organize upcoming meetings by reviewing and finalizing agendas for May 5 and May 12, 2026. They added new items to the schedules, set specific times for certain discussions, and reviewed public records from mid-to-late April.
keyTopics: Finalized agenda items for May 5 City Council meeting
Organized draft agenda for May 12 City Council meeting
Set specific time slots for scheduled agenda items
Reviewed public records from April 16-23, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 30, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on April 30, 2026 to approve previous meeting notes and hear directly from residents with concerns or comments. The council reviewed and made funding decisions on neighborhood grant applications for the upcoming fiscal year 2026-27, determining which community projects and initiatives would receive city money.
keyTopics: Approval of previous meeting minutes
Public comment period for residents
Neighborhood grant funding decisions for 2026-27 budget year
Council discussion and committee reports

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 28, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special evening meeting on April 28, 2026 to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents had the opportunity to provide feedback both in person and online during the public comment period.
keyTopics: Board and Commission candidate interviews
In-person public comment from residents
Online participation option for residents
Special study session format

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 30, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met on April 30, 2026, primarily to approve meeting notes from the Economic Development Committee's previous sessions in January and March. The council also opened the floor for residents to speak about any issues they wanted to bring up, though they can't make decisions on topics not officially on the agenda.
keyTopics: Approval of January 29, 2026 Economic Development Committee minutes
Approval of March 27, 2026 Economic Development Committee minutes
Public comment period for residents (3 minutes per speaker)

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large promotional signs to be displayed on buildings around Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The council also approved a new contract with the local firefighters union covering 2026-2029.
keyTopics: Temporary supergraphic signs permitted near Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026 events
New firefighters union contract approved for 2026-2029
One agenda item was withdrawn by staff before the meeting

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on April 21, 2026, to approve the city's next fiscal year budget and development plans, while also reviewing tax policies and homelessness initiatives. The council conducted public hearings on these matters and approved meeting minutes from previous sessions.
keyTopics: FY 2026-27 budget and development spending approval
Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act reissuance
User fees and service charges updates
Santa Clara County homelessness prevention plan
City council meeting schedule confirmation

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 29, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to consider a proposal to divide a vacant 1-acre lot on Old Trace Road into nine home plots, which would allow for nine new single-family houses and seven smaller accessory units (like in-law apartments). The council also handled routine business like scheduling meetings and electing leadership positions.
keyTopics: Subdivision approval for 4103 Old Trace Road - splitting 1 lot into 9 residential lots
New construction: 9 single-family homes + 7 junior accessory dwelling units planned
Environmental review exemption approved under state law
Election of council chair and vice chair positions
